<!-- What does this PR change, and why? -->

## Related Issue

<!-- e.g. Closes #12 -->

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor / internal

## Testing

- [ ] `pytest` passes locally
- [ ] Added/updated tests for the change

<!-- Describe how you tested, including OS and Python version. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Modules stay small and single-purpose
- [ ] No new runtime dependencies (or discussed in the issue)
- [ ] ctypes calls declare `restype`/`argtypes` where applicable
- [ ] Documentation updated if behavior changed
